feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Struggling to automate SAP WebGUI testing.
entry.content:
Struggling with automating SAP GUI for HTML (WebGUI) using OPA5 — wondering if others have faced the same.

While OPA5 works well for UI5 apps, things start breaking down when WebGUI comes into the picture. Since WebGUI runs inside an iframe and isn’t a UI5 application, OPA5 doesn’t seem to recognize or interact with those elements at all.

Some of the issues I’ve been hitting:

• Unable to locate or interact with WebGUI elements using OPA5
• Controls exist in DOM but OPA5 cannot access them
• Dynamic IDs and rendering make selectors unreliable
• Switching context to iframe isn’t supported in OPA5 the way it’s needed
• Hybrid apps (UI5 + WebGUI) create a major gap in automation strategy

At this point, I’m trying to figure out if there’s a reliable way to handle WebGUI automation within an OPA5-based setup — or if a completely different approach is needed.

Would love to hear if anyone has tackled this problem or found a workaround.

#SAP #OPA5 #WebGUI #TestAutomation #UI5

entry.title: SLED mandatory check ignored in Fiori App F1043 (Post Goods Receipt) - Works in MIGO (S/4 Private)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition and facing a discrepancy between GUI (MIGO) and Fiori (F1043) regarding the Shelf Life Expiration Date (SLED) mandatory check.

The Context: Our business requirement is to force users to enter the Expiration Date manually during Goods Receipt (101) without providing a Production Date.

  • Material Master (MARA): MHDHB (Total Shelf Life) = 0 / MHDRZ (Min. Rem. Shelf Life) = 1.

  • Configuration (V_159L): * Plant Check: Active.

    • Movement Type 101: Set to "1" (Enter Expiration Date).

The Issue:

  • In MIGO (GUI): Everything works perfectly. The system identifies the material is SLED-relevant (due to Min. Rem. Shelf Life > 0) and since Total Shelf Life is 0, it forces a manual entry of the Expiration Date.

  • In Fiori App (F1043): The field "Shelf Life Expiration Date" is NOT mandatory. Users can post the GR without any date, which bypasses our inventory controls.

In summary, how can I force the SLED to be mandatory in the Fiori "Post Goods Receipt" app when Total Shelf Life is 0, since it already works correctly in MIGO?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Extend My Inbox List View App
entry.content:
We have a requirement to add a functionality in My Inbox list view app.

** For the table display there are two option sort/group the requirement is to save the sort/group as layout.

Currently if we set a sort and grouping it applies but if we go back and came back to the app again they are not presisting,

Is this achievable ? Or if anyone has worked on similar requirement .
IF yes please provide help, provide any documentation or blog or anything.

It has become a bottleneck, URGENT!

entry.title: How can I set a default value in an F4 search help for a custom field
entry.content:
What is the recommended way to prefill a field inside an F4 search help with a value from another screen field?
Field A already contains a selected value; Field B uses an F4 help that returns multiple columns including the same field as Field A. When the user presses F4 on Field B, I want the search help to open with that corresponding parameter prefilled (and used as a selection criterion) from Field A. 

The Field B F4 comes from a CDS-based search help; which methods can I use to prefill a parameter in that CDS search help with the value from Field A

Please list the recommended approaches

entry.title: Choose transport popup - functionality on a custom Fiori Application?
entry.content:
Hi all - We have a custom Fiori application that is based on a older legacy program of ours. With clean clore being the goal alot of our source code has been adjusted to use SAP ABAP cloud released objects. The Fiori application has checkboxes for user selection on the UI and when trigerred -> ABAP back-end will add entries to some custom DB tables that we have. Our old legacy program allowed the user to choose a customizing request via a popup to capture these entries in the transport. The idea is to build out the same functionality on our Fiori Application. Prompt user for customizing transport on the UI and then capture the DB entries to the selected transport. 

We used the below function modules for the transport functionality in our old legacy program that I believe are no longer clean core compatabile/not released for public cloud. Has anybody had a similar requirement in the past? Does SAP have released cloud objects to replace the older function modules? Doing some research into this at the moment. 
CALL FUNCTION 'TRINT_ORDER_CHOICE'
CALL FUNCTION 'TR_OBJECTS_INSERT'

entry.title: 502 Bad Gateway when embedding SAP UI5 App via Managed Approuter and IFrame
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am facing a 502 Bad Gateway error when attempting to embed an existing SAP UI5 application into a new UI5 project using an IFrame on SAP BTP.

The Scenario:

  1. App A (Source): An existing SAP UI5 application (URL provided to me).

  2. App B (Wrapper): A new SAP UI5 application deployed on BTP where I am trying to embed App A via an <iframe />.

  3. Destination: I have created a destination in the BTP Cockpit pointing to the hostname of App A with Authentication: NoAuthentication and Proxy Type: Internet.

Technical Implementation:

In my xs-app.json (Managed Approuter), I have defined the route as follows:

JSON
 
 
{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/sap/(.*)$",
      "target": "/sap/$1",
      "destination": "Test2",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/test-resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}

In my View Controller, I am setting the IFrame source dynamically: 

 
var sSrvUrl = sap.ui.require.toUrl("projectxxxxxxxxxx");
var surl = sSrvUrl + "/sap/xx/xxxxxx/xxxxxxxxxxx/index.html";

console.log("URL" + sFullUrl_1);

         

this.byId("html1").setContent(`
   <iframe 
                    src="${surl }"
                    width="100%"
                    height="500px"
                    style="border: none;">
                </iframe>
            `);

The Issue:

  • When I use a standard public URL (like https://en.wikipedia.org) in the destination and route, the IFrame loads correctly.

  • When I use the SAP UI5 application URL, the Approuter returns a 502 Bad Gateway.

Troubleshooting Done:

  • Confirmed the destination "Check Connection" returns 200 OK or 302.

  • Verified that the source UI5 app is accessible directly in the browser.

  • Checked for X-Frame-Options or Content-Security-Policy (CSP) headers; however, the error is a 502 (network/gateway level), not a 403 or a browser blocked error.

Question: Is there a specific configuration required in the destination or xs-app.json when the target is another SAP-hosted UI5 application? Could this be related to the Approuter failing to handle the redirect or a protocol mismatch (HTTP/HTTPS)?

Any insights would be greatly appreciated!

SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment 

@ArunJacob @junwu @georg_claude1

entry.title: Manage Sales Orders - Version 2 Fiori app - Restrict Create/Edit/Display based on Authorization Role
entry.content:
Hi, 

We are implementing Manage Sales Order V2 in our S4 HANA 2023 system. We have a need to restrict the Create/Edit/Display functionality based on Roles. So we will need to create 3 different PFCG roles, Display Role can only display the Sales Documents. Create role can create and so on. 

are these any options to control the Create/Edit/Display options based on authorization objects? What is the best approach to do it?

Regards

Sandip

entry.title: Is there a quick way to fill the amount field with remaining balance in app F1520 AR/AP Items tab?
entry.content:
Hi,

Find from note 3421357 - F1069 - Enable double click to autofill amount

'You would like a quick way to fill the amount field with remaining balance in posting/clearing Fiori apps in tabs 'Post on Account' and 'Post to G/L Account'.  With this note, it will be possible to autofill the amount by double clicking the amount field.'

Is there a solution to enable double click to autofill amount in AR/AP Items tab, like the function in Tcode F-28?

Thanks!

Lena

entry.title: SAP RAP display multi value field WIDE
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a model with parent->child (1:n) where the "child" is just a way of selecting multi-values for the header.
I can show the field on the object page like this:

@ui.multiLineText: true
@ui: { lineItem: [ { value: '_Child.FieldA', importance: #HIGH } ] }
@ui.fieldGroup: [{ position: 1, qualifier: 'GroupA', value: '_Child.FieldA'} ]
@ui.identification: [ { position: 30 } ]
_Child;

My ISSUE is that the field is displayed as a normal field and I would like to have it to filled WIDE - the full page width
I have tried with "@ui.multiLineText: true" - but no effect

Anybody that have solved this - "show the field WIDE"
Please help me

Thanks!

entry.title: HTML5 (Custom Fiori) app fails with 500 (token exchange) in TST only – works in DEV & ACC landscape
entry.content:
We have a custom HTML5 app deployed to the HTML5 Application Repository and launched via managed Launchpad / Work Zone.

  •  DEV – works
  • ACC – works
  • TST – fails

Same MTA, same UI artifacts, same configuration pattern across all landscapes.

Problem (TST only)

  • /index.html
  • /manifest.json
  • /Component-preload.js

All return:
HTTP 500 – Internal Server Error Failed to exchange login token by an XSUAA token Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'url') identityzone undefined / clientid undefined

This happens for all users and occurs before any backend (CAP) call.

What is already verified

  1. HTML5 app is correctly uploaded and visible via cf html5-list
  2. Single app ID
  3. public visibility
  4. HTML5 repository destination exists and matches ACC:
  • sap.cloud.service
  • uri / content_endpoint
  • app_host_id
  • xsappname
  • OAuth2ClientCredentials
  • HTML5 repo host service key contains valid UAA data
  • Work Zone content provider updated
  • Same issue when launching via HTML5 Applications (not Work Zone specific)
  • Other HTML5 apps run fine in the same TST subaccount

Key observation
Since static files fail, this looks like a managed approuter / Launchpad runtime token‑exchange failure, not a CAP or UI build issue.

Has anyone seen a case where:

  • HTML5 repo content is present and public
  • Repository destination & service key are correct
  • DEV/ACC work
  • but one landscape fails with 500 during managed runtime token exchange?

Is this a known:

  • Launchpad runtime issue?
  • HTML5 repository runtime issue?
  • Internal managed destination / UAA resolution issue?
  • Any pointers, SAP Notes, or similar experience would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance 

Regards,
Raghav

entry.title: Issue with Japanese IME Input Recognition in Value Help Search Field (Fiori Elements)
entry.content:
In a SAP Fiori Elements application running on SAPUI5 1.120.2, using OData V4 and CAPM (Nodejs) as backend service, we implement Value Help using annotations only (@Common.ValueList).


When users input Japanese text using IME in the search field inside the Value Help and perform conversion (space + enter), the latest converted value is not recognized by the search field for the first time. If user closes the Value Help dialog and enters the input again for the second time, the search field works as expected.


Unexpected result: 

  • The result list is not updated according to the latest input.

Expected Result: 

  • The result list should be updated immediately based on the final converted Japanese text, without requiring the dialog to be reopened.
Question:  Has anyone experienced this issue before? If so, how was it resolved? Any guidance would be appreciated.

entry.title: Problem with Flexibility for Key Users Service in CF
entry.content:
Hello,

I have deployed my App in CF and I want to save Variants with  UI5 Flexibility for Key Users service.

 

Problem:

 

When I try to save a new Variant in VariantManagement I get an Error 500:

Payload:

What I have done:

I have Entitlement for UI5 Flexibility for Key Users service in my Subaccount.

Bootstrapping in my App:

 

data-sap-ui-flexibilityServices='[{"connector":"BtpServiceConnector","url":"/keyuser"}]'

 

Manifest.js:

 

"sap.ui5": { "flexEnabled": true,

 

My Standalone App router has this route:

 

{ "source": "^/keyuser/(.*)$", "target": "$1", "service": "com.sap.ui.flex.cf.keyuser", "endpoint": "keyuser" },

 

mta.yaml:

Creation of service instance for the UI5 flexibility:

 

- name: demoappdemoapp-ui5-flexibility-keyuser parameters: service: ui5-flexibility-keyuser service-plan: keyuser type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service

 

Binding of UI5 flexibility to the application router:

 

modules: requires: - name: demoappdemoapp-ui5-flexibility-keyuser

 

 ​My SmartVariantManagement in View1.view.xml:

 

<svm:SmartVariantManagement id="svm" persistencyKey="BillingFilterBarVariant" showExecuteOnSelection="true" useFavorites="true" />

 

Can somebody help me with this case?

 

Regards,

Timur

entry.title: Error: Cannot access the SAP Business Accelerator Hub service information for Business Partner (A2X)
entry.content:
Hi,

I am busy with BAS400 (Develop cloud applications using SAP Business Application Studio) in order to do the CAP Certification. In the section Consuming an External Service From SAP S/4HANA the training you have to add an external service from SAP Business Accelerator Hub (Business Partner (A2X)). When you add it, it asks for your  SAP Business Accelerator Hub username and password. I have tried to enter both my e-mail and S ID with password but both times get an error that it cannot be accessed and I should add my credentials again? What am I missing? While I am doing it, I am logged into SAP Business Accelerator Hub?

"label": "service-center",
  "level": "error",
  "message": "Could not get the ApiHub resource data. Cannot access the SAP Business Accelerator Hub service information for Business Partner (A2X). Try to enter your SAP Business Accelerator Hub credentials again.",
  "stack": "Error: Cannot access the SAP Business Accelerator Hub service information for Business Partner (A2X). Try to enter your SAP Business Accelerator Hub credentials again.
    at _.getData (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.26/dist/extension.js:8:713955)
    at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:105:5)
    at _.getUiData (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.26/dist/extension.js:8:712995)
    at t.addItemToFactoryCacheAndConnect (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.26/dist/extension.js:8:849892)
    at iy.h (file:///extbin/local/openvscode-server/out/vs/workbench/api/node/extensionHostProcess.js:114:41613)
    at l.apiHubResourceClicked (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.26/dist/extension.js:8:728785)
    at func (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.26/dist/extension.js:8:719243)",
  "time": "2026-04-16T10:47:18.954Z"

 Kind Regards

Deon

entry.title: v 2 oData get response http 404 resource not found
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Kindly check the oData error in the mock server oData v2 responses back with 404 http code.

This standard code besides the walkthrogh tutorial. I can't reason of the failure to simulate the moclserver.

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/ui/thirdparty/jquery",
    "sap/ui/core/date/UI5Date",
    "sap/ui/core/util/MockServer",
    "sap/base/Log"
], (jQuery, UI5Date, MockServer, Log) => {
    "use strict";

    return {
        /**
         * Initializes the mock server.
         * You can configure the delay with the URL parameter "serverDelay".
         * The local mock data in this folder is returned instead of the real data for testing.
         * 
         */
        init() {
            // create
            const oMockServer = new MockServer({rootUri: "/"});

            oMockServer.simulate("../localService/metadata.xml", {
                sMockdataBaseUrl: "../localService/mockdata",
                bGenerateMissingMockData: true
            });
            // handling mocking a function import call step
            const aRequests = oMockServer.getRequests();
            aRequests.push({
                method: "GET",
                path: new RegExp("FindUpcomingMeetups(.*)"),
                response: (oXhr) => {
                    Log.debug("Incoming request for FindUpcomingMeetups");
                    const oToday = UI5Date.getInstance();
                    oToday.setHours(0); // or oToday.toUTCString(0) due to timezone differences
                    oToday.setMinutes(0);
                    oToday.setSeconds(0);
                    // the mock server only works with sap.jQuery.ajax and async: false. But the request does not
                    // actually go to a server, so this does not block the main thread.
                    jQuery.ajax({
                        url: `/Meetups?$filter=EventDate ge datetime'${oToday.toISOString()}'`,
                        dataType : 'json',
                        async: false,
                        success : (oData) => {
                            oXhr.respondJSON(200, {}, JSON.stringify(oData));
                        }
                    });
                    return true;
                }
            });
            oMockServer.setRequests(aRequests);

            // handling custom URL parameter step
            const fnCustom = (oEvent) => {
                const oXhr = oEvent.getParameter("oXhr");
                if (oXhr?.url.includes("first")) {
                    oEvent.getParameter("oFilteredData").results.splice(3, 100);
                }
            };
            oMockServer.attachAfter("GET", fnCustom, "Meetups");


            // start
            oMockServer.start();

            Log.info("Running the app with mock data");
        }
    };
});

Thanks

Kaushik

entry.title: app for loading materials while respecting clean core principles
entry.content:
I want to create an application that loads materials in Excel format and inserts the data according to the standard. Previously, I would have used a BAPI, but from what I understand, this wouldn't be compatible with the SAP core. What would be the correct approach: RAP -> SAP API? Considering that using only RAP could cause time limit issues for very large volumes?

S4 -> ON-PREMISE 2021

entry.title: We need to add the field PROF_AUFNR in standard JV upload template in Fiori APP F2548F
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I hope you are doing well,

We need to add the field PROF_AUFNR in standard JV upload template in Fiori APP F2548F, is it possible to add field in JV template?

Please provide more information about the field adding in standard JV template and process steps.

Thank you

entry.title: How to control the labels of associated fields?
entry.content:
In fiori elments I want to include SelectionFields to filter my entity. The entity has an association to another entity which in itself has a chain of associations.

I now want to control the Labels of these fields like this:

annotate service.MyEntity with @(
    UI.SelectionFields : [
        field1_material_customer_customerfield,
        field1_material_ID,
        field1_message_ID,
    ],
);

annotate service.MyEntity with {
    // header .Label : 'header_message_ID',
    field1_material_customer_customerfield .Label: '{i18n>customer}'
};

 

The entity I annotate has the field "field1" as an association to the other entity. This entity has the field e.g. "material" as an association.

 

Hope this makes it clear.

 

Best regards

entry.title: SAP RISE system copy - Customer Fiori post steps
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can anyone of you please share with me SAP RISE private cloud 2023 system copy document and post steps for FIORI from customer side.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: UI5/Fiori Elements V4 Upgrade: Navigating the AddressViaNavigationPath Breaking Change
entry.content:
# Introduction

Recently, I upgraded a UI5 and Fiori Elements V4 application from version 1.132.1 to 1.136.13. While the upgrade process was relatively smooth, I encountered an interesting breaking change related to entity associations and PATCH requests that I'd like to share with the community.

## The Issue

During testing, I discovered that PATCH requests for nested entity associations were suddenly failing after the upgrade. The root cause? A behavioral change in how the framework constructs update paths for related entities.

### What Changed

In versions prior to 1.135, when updating entities with one-to-many associations, the framework used **short paths** in PATCH requests. However, starting with version 1.135 and continuing through 1.136.13, the framework began using **long paths** when the following annotation was present at the entity container level:

```xml
<Annotation Term="Common.AddressViaNavigationPath" Bool="true"/>
```

**Example of the difference:**
- **Short path (old behavior):** `/EntityA(key1)/NavPropertyB/EntityB(key2)`
- **Long path (new behavior):** `/EntityA(key1)/to_NavPropertyB(key2)`

This change broke compatibility with existing backend services that expected the short path format.

## The Solution

The fix is straightforward and should be applied at the **CDS annotation level**. You need to explicitly set the `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath` annotation to `false` on your entities:

```cds
@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false
entity MyEntity {
// entity definition
}
```

### Implementation Steps

1. **Locate affected entities** - Identify entities with one-to-many associations that are being updated
2. **Add the annotation** - Apply `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false` to the entity definition
3. **Test PATCH requests** - Verify that update requests now use short paths
4. **Redeploy** - Deploy your changes and test end-to-end

## Why This Matters

This breaking change highlights an important principle when upgrading frameworks: **always test data modifications thoroughly**. While UI rendering changes are often immediately visible, changes to request payload structures can silently break integrations.

## Conclusion

If you're upgrading to Fiori Elements V4 1.135 or later and experience issues with entity updates, check your entity annotations. A simple `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false` annotation can restore the previous behavior and ensure backward compatibility with your backend services.

Have you encountered similar breaking changes during upgrades? Share your experiences in the comments below!

entry.title: Entering a long text while creating a dowpayment via FIORI app id F1688
entry.content:
Dear experts, 

I am creating a downpayment via FIORI app id F1688 - Manage Supplier Down Payment Requests. 

And as we have payment details with the text more than 170 symbols the field BSEG-SGTXT doesn't suit our requirement. 

For example, at Create Supplier Down Payment Requests entering a long text is available via Extras ---> Text (please find the screenshot below). 

That would be great if there is any chance to add Extras ---> Text somehow to that fiori app. (F1688)

Maybe we should activate something or take some steps? If it is not possible I would appreciate to get any tips or advices from you.

Thank you in advance.
